title: [ImportVerilog] Add (* full_case *) attribute support
body:
This patch adds support of `(* full_case *)` attribute in case statements, which says that all possible case items have been covered and no default clause is needed:
```
module test(
  input logic [1:0] a,
  output reg [2:0] x
);
  always @* begin
  (* full_case *)
  case (a)
    2'd0: x = 3'b001;
    2'd1: x = 3'b010;
    2'd2: x = 3'b100;
  endcase
  end
endmodule
```
Here the case statement doesn't cover `2'd3`. Without the attribute, compiler adds a basic block to handle all unmatched cases, which leads to conditional `llhd.drv` operation:
```
module {
  hw.module @test(in %a : i2, out x : i3) {
    %true = hw.constant true
    %0 = llhd.constant_time <0ns, 0d, 1e>
    %c0_i3 = hw.constant 0 : i3
    %c-2_i2 = hw.constant -2 : i2
    %c2_i3 = hw.constant 2 : i3
    %c1_i2 = hw.constant 1 : i2
    %c1_i3 = hw.constant 1 : i3
    %c0_i2 = hw.constant 0 : i2
    %x = llhd.sig %c0_i3 : i3
    %1 = llhd.prb %x : !hw.inout<i3>
    %2 = comb.icmp ceq %a, %c0_i2 : i2
    %3 = comb.icmp ceq %a, %c1_i2 : i2
    %4 = comb.icmp ceq %a, %c-2_i2 : i2
    %5 = comb.concat %4, %c0_i2 : i1, i2
    %6 = comb.xor %2, %true : i1
    %7 = comb.and %6, %3 : i1
    %8 = comb.mux %7, %c2_i3, %5 : i3
    %9 = comb.mux %2, %c1_i3, %8 : i3
    %10 = comb.or %2, %7, %4 : i1
    llhd.drv %x, %9 after %0 if %10 : !hw.inout<i3>
    hw.output %1 : i3
  }
}
```
With attribute, the last case item acts as the implicit default case:
```
module {
  hw.module @test(in %a : i2, out x : i3) {
    %c-4_i3 = hw.constant -4 : i3
    %c2_i3 = hw.constant 2 : i3
    %c1_i2 = hw.constant 1 : i2
    %c1_i3 = hw.constant 1 : i3
    %c0_i2 = hw.constant 0 : i2
    %0 = comb.icmp ceq %a, %c0_i2 : i2
    %1 = comb.icmp ceq %a, %c1_i2 : i2
    %2 = comb.mux %1, %c2_i3, %c-4_i3 : i3
    %3 = comb.mux %0, %c1_i3, %2 : i3
    hw.output %3 : i3
  }
}
```

[full_case directive description in commercial tool](http://www1.pldworld.com/@xilinx/html/technote/TOOL/MANUAL/21i_doc/data/fndtn/ver/ver7_4.htm)
